title: totem 61
description: Makes your Totem of Undying look like the 61 meme for fun and laughs
body: Totem 61 is a fun, simple, and lightweight Minecraft resource pack that transforms the ordinary Totem of Undying into something entirely new and humorous. Instead of the default emerald-colored design, this pack adds a fresh, meme-inspired texture that makes every revival moment feel unique and funny
